core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Change behavior to silently add a port to the reserved list if reservation fails, instead of throwing a RuntimeException.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Commented out 'throw new RuntimeException(...)' and added 'reserved.add(Integer.parseInt(property)); return;'

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct the loop to iterate over the current class in the hierarchy chain instead of the original class to properly find annotations in superclasses.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Changed `clazz.getDeclaredFields()` to `current.getDeclaredFields()` inside the do-while loop.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the generic Spring RestTemplate bean with a specific OpenAPI-generated PetApi client to align with the new API integration strategy.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed RestTemplateBuilder bean definition and added PetApi bean using ApiClient.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add imports for the new OpenAPI client classes and SLF4J logging framework required by the new configuration logic.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added imports for com.github.skjolber.pet.ApiClient, org.openapitools.client.api.PetApi, and org.slf4j.*.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Inject the base URL for the API client from application properties using Spring's @Value annotation.
Initialize a logger instance to enable logging within the configuration class.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DemoConfiguration.class);

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Refactor the service to use a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) instead of manually constructing HTTP requests with RestTemplate.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Replaced RestTemplate injection and manual RequestEntity construction with PetApi injection and direct method call petApi.addPet(inputPet).

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Adjust the method signature to throw the specific ApiException from the generated client instead of generic Exception or handling RestClientException.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Changed throws clause from Exception to ApiException and removed try-catch block for RestClientException.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Populate the Pet object with additional fields (id, status, category) required or expected by the new API client implementation.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added inputPet.setId(3L), inputPet.setStatus(Pet.StatusEnum.AVAILABLE), and set a new Category object.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Clean up imports related to the removed RestTemplate and manual URI handling logic.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed imports for java.net.URI, java.net.URISyntaxException, org.springframework.http.*, and org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add imports for the new generated API client and model classes.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added imports for com.github.skjolber.pet.ApiException, com.github.skjolber.pet.model.Category, com.github.skjolber.pet.model.Pet, and org.openapitools.client.api.PetApi.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Remove the dependency on the external URL configuration property since the generated client handles endpoint configuration.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed @Value("${my.url}") private String myUrl; field and its associated import.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
Explicitly define the mock endpoint path to ensure correct routing in the test context.
Use static import for ArgumentMatchers.any to simplify mock stubbing syntax.
Correct the assertion in the failure test case to expect an exception rather than a null result.
Add new test cases to verify successful pet creation and argument capture.
Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
Specify the base path for the mocked endpoint to match the updated API configuration.
Wrap service call in try-catch to handle ApiException thrown by the updated client library on error responses.
Update import statements to reflect changes in the generated OpenAPI client package structure.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new Jetty 12/EE10 package structure for WebAppContext.
Update the Configuration array type to use the new Jetty 12/EE10 package path to match the updated WebAppContext.
Update imports to use the Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure instead of the legacy EE9 packages.
Add a call to the Builder constructor in the superclass to satisfy Jetty 12's new configuration instantiation requirements.
Update imports and type casting to use the new Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure and ServletContextApi interface.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.human_impl: Changed imports from org.eclipse.jetty.servlet to org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.servlet and cast getServletContext() to ServletContextApi.

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Implement AutoCloseable interface to ensure the embedded server is destroyed when the extension lifecycle ends.
junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.human_impl: implements AutoCloseable { @Override public void close() { server.destroy(); } }

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Add a static flag to track if the extension has been initialized to manage global state.
Register the extension instance in the global JUnit 5 store to allow access across test contexts.

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
